chapter_title.ar: باب فِيمَا يُصَابُ مِنَ الْبَهَائِمِ وَ غَيْرِهَا مِنَ الدَّوَابِّ
chapter_title.en: Chapter 54 – Regarding what is hit from the cattle and others from the animals

text: قَالَ أَمِيرُ الْمُؤْمِنِينَ ( عليه السلام ) فِيمَنْ قَتَلَ كَلْبَ الصَّيْدِ قَالَ يُقَوِّمُهُ وَ كَذَلِكَ الْبَازِي وَ كَذَلِكَ كَلْبُ الْغَنَمِ وَ كَذَلِكَ كَلْبُ الْحَائِطِ .

en.hubeali: Ali, from his father, from Al Nowfaly, from Al Sakuny,

(It has been narrated) from Abu Abdullah<sup>asws</sup> having said: ‘Amir Al-Momineen<sup>asws</sup> said regarding the one who killed the hunting dog: ‘It would be evaluated, and similar to that is the falcon, and similar to that is the sheep dog, and similar to that is the wall (guard) dog’.
